title: Fails to SAT solve, but why?
code_blocks:
read_verilog -sv ./option1.v ; opt; prep; memory ; rename -top gold; design -stash gold;
read_verilog -sv ./option2.v ; opt; prep; memory ; rename -top gate; design -stash gate;
design -copy-from gold -as gold gold
design -copy-from gate -as gate gate

miter -equiv -make_assert -flatten gold gate equiv
hierarchy -top equiv
sat -prove-asserts -show-inputs -max 2 -verify -set-init-undef -ignore_unknown_cells equiv
